name: warp
description: Secondary-sidebar coding agent for VS Code & Cursor. Chat with Grok Build over ACP: tools, slash commands, model/effort, history, and OAuth.

warp.permissionMode.markdownDescription: Tool permission mode. **ask** Ã¢â‚¬â€ prompt every tool. **auto** Ã¢â‚¬â€ allow safe/read tools, prompt for writes and shell. **yolo** Ã¢â‚¬â€ skip prompts (`--always-approve`). YOLO requires confirmation in the UI.

warp.alwaysApprove.markdownDescription: Legacy alias for YOLO. Prefer `warp.permissionMode`. When true, treated as **yolo** if `permissionMode` is unset.

warp.defaultEffort.markdownDescription: Default reasoning effort for new turns when the model supports it.

warp.sandboxProfile.markdownDescription: Sandbox limits for agent tools (stored for Grok CLI profiles). **off** Ã¢â‚¬â€ no extra limits. **workspace** Ã¢â‚¬â€ project folder. **read-only** Ã¢â‚¬â€ no writes. **strict** Ã¢â‚¬â€ tightest profile.

warp.showThinking.markdownDescription: Show reasoning/thinking blocks in the chat transcript.

warp.groupToolRows.markdownDescription: Collapse noisy tool activity into grouped rows in the transcript.

warp.scrollWithStream.markdownDescription: When on, the chat scrolls to the bottom as tokens stream. Turn off to stay put while reading earlier messages.

warp.autoCompactPercent.markdownDescription: Auto-compact when context usage reaches this percent (0Ã¢â‚¬â€œ100). **0 = off Ã‚Â· 100 = only at full context.** Also writes Grok `[session] auto_compact_threshold_percent`.

warp.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the Grok / Grokfork binary that supports `agent stdio` (ACP). Leave empty to auto-detect (`grokfork`, `grok`, `~/.grok/bin/grok`, `~/bin/grokfork`).

warp.defaultCwd.markdownDescription: Folder the agent uses when **no workspace folder** is open. Empty = `~/.warp/workspace` (clean sandbox). Does not override an open project folder.

warp.mockMode.description: UI-only mock replies without spawning the agent (for development).

warp.subagentsEnabled.markdownDescription: Allow Grok multi-agent (subagents / task tool). Sets `GROK_SUBAGENTS=1` on the agent process. Restart the agent after changing. Spec: grokinfoxai Subagents.

warp.billingApiBase.markdownDescription: Base URL for Warp Pro billing (Stripe checkout + license check). No trailing slash.

scripts.package:public: npm run compile && npm run package
